'''Lomabu III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Lomabu system/Legends|Lomabu system]], which was located near the [[Aida system/Legends|Aida system]]. It had only one [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and was covered almost completely by [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] interrupted by long archipelagos. These islands many [[Beach/Legends|beaches]] were covered by carnivorous flagellate microorganisms. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] depopulated the planet of its natives as punishment for rebelling against Imperial authority, then used the planet as a penal colony for fugitive [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Imperial Governor of the system, [[Io Desnand]], planned to stage an attack on the penal colony, thus baiting Rebel ships into a rescue attempt. Desnand's plan was foiled when the Wookiee prisoners were [[Mission to Lomabu III|rescued]] by [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] and the Wookiee [[Chenlambec]].
